//why-this-buildCommand: We restructure the output so no file sits at dist/index.html. That matters because Vercel's static-file resolver runs BEFORE rewrites — if /index.html exists, it wins, and the / -> /about rewrite never fires. By moving the app into dist/app/ and the landing into dist/about/, the root `/` has nothing to serve statically and the rewrite takes over.
buildCommand: npm run build && mkdir -p dist/app && mv dist/index.html dist/app/index.html && if [ -d dist/fonts ]; then mv dist/fonts dist/app/fonts; fi && if [ -f dist/kturtle-logo.svg ]; then mv dist/kturtle-logo.svg dist/app/kturtle-logo.svg; fi && mkdir -p dist/about && cp -r docs/. dist/about/ && cp scripts/install-linux.sh dist/_install.sh
